scripts.upload-html: ali-oss-upload-cli upload --source ./dist --target static/topic/__TOPIC_UUID__/ --filter "*.html" --headers "Cache-Control:no-cache,no-store,must-revalidate" --headers "Content-Security-Policy:default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https://oss.talesofai.cn; media-src 'self' https://oss.talesofai.cn; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.talesofai.cn https://pre.api.talesofai.cn; frame-ancestors https://app.nieta.art capacitor://app.nieta.art; upgrade-insecure-requests" --skipConsCheck --force
scripts.publish: pnpm build && pnpm upload-assets && pnpm upload-html
